dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Thought you could get away that easy, eh?

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: I bring the suffering that was promised to you when you cast me into the world of the bristly!
Bringing punishment to the thief who stole the child's hair salon coupons was a long and arduous journey.
If all the child wanted was simply revenge, it would have been more efficient to rely on the element of surprise to capture and mete out the deserved consequences.
But that simply would not do. "Uncool" solutions were not an option for the child.
Heart-pumping electronic dance music, fully slicked-back hair, and flashy sunglasses still worn even in the dark of the night...
These were the hallmarks of a "badass" and "cool" entrance befitting a Big Brother of the Middle, thought the child.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Oi, half-pint... You the one who nicked my coupons?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: W-what the hell... I'd heard you might still be in pursuit, but... You came all the way here for that, you damn stalker?!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... Stalker? Mate, you seem to be under some grave misconception, 'cuz goin' after a thief ain't the same thing as stalkin' someone.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... It's terminal audacity to think that, innit?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: Well, what else am I supposed to call an obsessed freak who chased me all the way across the City from U Corp. Great Lake?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: It gets to a point, man.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Failure to recognize your own crimes... Blatant lack of apology or any sign of remorse for stealing the victim's deserved lusciousness... Insistence on contentious behaviour...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Looks like you're gettin' another line in the Book—

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Oi, who added this already?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: This individual's violation was logged for later punishment in accordance with Title 6, Section 2, Row A.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... Yeah?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: Yes. Because the individual's behavior met the specific conditions required to invoke the aforementioned article.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: But... this bloke's... Eh, nevermind. You did good, lad.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Alright, let's get this back on track...! The point is, you've just bought yourself another line in the book.

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: ... All this over a lousy coupon to a hair salon, you crazy bastard?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: I told you I'll pay you back for it, didn't I? Time and time again, I asked if we could make a deal, and you refused to listen every damn time...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: A lousy hair coupon, really? After narkin' me, insulting me by assuming this grudge could be swept under the rug with bribery? A lousy hair coupon?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: Searching for sections relevant to "narking."

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: No, forget it. I think I can forgive that minor slight as long as he returns a little something.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: That hair coupon you nicked from me... Hand it over.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Get your noggin ready, 'cuz this ain't just about the coupon anymore.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: It's about the shame of having to show myself under the sun day after day with a hairdo that has slid so far into the world of the bristly... It's about the desperation of wanting to hide under a cap, yet having to parade around my humiliation... because wearing a cap would've sapped even more vitality from my hair!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... All of that has coalesced into this simmering wrath as I journeyed to the east... And I haven't even begun my Pilgrimage of Loyalty to earn the right to become a Great Brother!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: The only thing that'll put this righteous anger to sleep is... to become luscious.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: That's right, you daft bastard. That hair coupon you stole from me is now lusciousness incarnate.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: What I'm sayin' is that I'm generous enough to turn a blind eye to your... minor insults as long as you return an object of such significance back to my hands. So quit stallin' and cough it up.

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: Huh. And what if I said I can't even if I wanted to? What then?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Sister
dataList.content: Art thou refusing to return what belongeth to the rightful owner?

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: No, as much as it narks me to admit it... That wasn't a refusal.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Your hair, it's become...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... luscious.
The Little Siblings' eyes instantly darted toward the coupon thief's hair at the child's comment.
The hair looked as though it would flow and wrap gently around the hand when one combs through it with their fingers...
... Frankly, the subtleties of hairstyling weren't immediately apparent, but borrowing the child's vocabulary, the thief's hair must have become... luscious.
And the fact that such an elevated state was attained not by the child but the thief meant that—

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: You little shit! Just stealing Big Bro's hair coupons wasn't enough, huh? You just had to use it too, huh?!

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: 'Course I did! Why do you think I stole it in the first place?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: I mean, just think about it in my shoes. There's really no point in getting a single line forgiven when I'm already neck-deep in your Book of Vengeance, get what I'm saying?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: And hey, thought I might as well go enjoy a nice visit to the private hair salon when I got the chance, since you're gonna come after me for the rest of my life anyway. Salon du Moelleux, was it? Sure lived up to its name, hah!

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: ... He must be mad.
Was it wisdom, or foolishness?

The thief's name was indeed attached to a countless number of Vengeances in the Book, which included stealing from the child's safe, fleeing from the Middle's Vengeance—and everything that happened between then and now.
Like he said, getting a single Vengeance forgiven wouldn't make a nick of difference anyway.
Because whichever excuse he had to give, it would end in his execution.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: He sure is awfully mouthy for a bloke about to pop his clogs... You lads reckon he's got Life Insurance or somethin'?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: A single execution may not be a sufficient counterweight that negates the grudge. However...

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: Mm. There exists precedent for a crime not entirely dissimilar to the one currently being addressed, in which a subject whose life was Insured was killed over a dozen times to be rendered into a state of post-resuscitation mental degradation and punch-drunkenness prior to complete and total extermination.

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Sister
dataList.content: Y-yet the villain doth persist in uttering such vile insults to our Big Brother!

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Sister
dataList.content: In moments such as this, m-methinks justice ought to be delivered posthaste...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Hmm... goin' off Great Brother's advice, either way's decent enough...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: What's your take, Sinclair?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: Um... How about tenderizing him half-dead first? You'll have an easier time deciding what to do with him once he's too busy swallowing teeth to talk back.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... Hah! I like the sound of that!

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: Oh! Th-that's...!
Perhaps the child was pleased with the suggestion,
Because he produced an adorably tiny sticker from the inside of his coat and pressed it neatly onto his Little Brother's Book.

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: Thank you, Big Bro...!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Right, let's crack on with it, then. Let's give him a proper thrashin' before thinkin' about what comes next.

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: You seriously think Life Insurance's what I'm planning to fall back on?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: You don't actually believe that I spotted you chasing me across half the City and just... didn't bother setting anything up, do you?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: That sound... Something's closing in. Meursault, what time is it?

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: It is currently 3:13 in the morning. The Night in the Backstreets has begun.

A tremor spread through the ground, drawing closer with every passing second. It was the sound of the Sweepers flooding through the roads—for Backstreets residents, a rumble on the road as familiar as the rumble of one's own breath.

Still... there was something off about this whole situation. The entrance through which the child and his Little Siblings chased their mark looked hastily put together, and the thief was already sprinting toward another room.
It didn't take long for the child to piece things together. His voice sharply cut through the air as soon as he realized what exactly the thief had in store.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ...! Grab that bastard! Now!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Bollocks, I knew somethin' about the entrance looked makeshift...

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: Hahaha!! Too slow!!

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: Have fun getting swept away, dumbasses! They won't even leave a bloodstain behind once they're done with you!

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Sister
dataList.content: Fie! The wretched villain hath fled into the adjacent room! Our righteous fury shall smite through the door and—

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: *fume* ... Nah. That ain't some hideout—that's a proper residential area.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: That cheeky half-pint used his noggin, didn't he.

dataList.title: The Middle's Little Brother
dataList.content: ... Looks like we're gonna have to hold out against the Sweeper waves, Big Bro.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Don't ya worry your little head now, lad.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Even if we get swept away by the waves... the Middle'll settle that score proper. Nobody walks away from the Vengeance.
The Night in the Backstreets passed, as it always does.
The thief stepped out from his building, bold and smug.

He congratulated himself for this well-thought-out plan that finally shook the persistent stalker. No one can survive the tides of Sweepers that consume everything and everyone in their path, he believed. Not even the child.
However... he seemed to have underestimated the child's tenacity—the unyielding doggedness of the Syndicate that calls itself the Middle.

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: Y-you... Stalker freak! How are you still alive?!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: That it, then? All that prep and you're already done?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: Shit... Damn it!

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief
dataList.content: L-look, don't kill me just yet. There's something you should know...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Wha, that you weren't actually the one who nicked the coupon?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief?
dataList.content: Exactly, I'm not the thie—wait... Y-you already knew?!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Course I did. That bloke in the security footage wasn't anywhere near as tiny as you, half-pint. Gives it away, innit?

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief?
dataList.content: Ah... Ahh...!

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Been givin' it a think, yeah. Whether I ought to crack your skull open like an egg... or just keep killin' you over and over till this burning anger's spent and satisfied.

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief?
dataList.content: W-wait! I'll talk. I'll tell you everything, so please...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: It ain't my business findin' out what bloody ties you've got to the real thief now. My lads'll dig 'em up soon enough.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: And you not bein' the thief makes no difference either. You've already gone and earned yourself a fresh grudge with me with that little trick you pulled.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: Truth be told, I'm sick of this whole mess givin' me a headache. Got a Pilgrimage of Loyalty comin' up, yeah? Proper nightmare, that Labor. I'd rather clear out all the useless rubbish clutterin' my path before I dedicate myself to it.

dataList.title: Hair Coupon Thief?
dataList.content: I... I can help you! Let me ditch that fucking thief and work for you instead...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: That does it.

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: You flapping your lying gob, baskin' in that lusciousness like you're the only one who earned it...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: That's about enough to get you and every last sod tied to you...

dataList.title: The Middle's Big Brother
dataList.content: ... IMMEDIATE, COMPLETE, AND TOTAL EXTERMINATION!
